featureSections.title: Advanced Diagnostics for Every Make & Model
featureSections.body: We use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately, saving you time and money. No guesswork, just reliable results.
featureSections.cardBody: Our thorough diagnostics ensure we fix the right problem the first time.

featureSections.title: Complete Auto Care Under One Roof
featureSections.body: From brakes to batteries, transmissions to tires, we handle it all. No need to visit multiple shops – we’re your one-stop solution for vehicle maintenance and repair.
featureSections.cardBody: Save time with comprehensive care at a single, trusted location.

whyChooseUs.title: ASE-Certified Mechanics

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Running Smoothly?

servicesPage.intro: At Buckner Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services for all makes and models. Our ASE-certified technicians use the latest tools and techniques to keep your vehicle running at its best.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake service to keep you safe on the road.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle’s most critical safety system. We inspect, repair, and replace pads, rotors, calipers, and brake lines to ensure stopping power you can trust. Whether you hear squealing or feel vibration, we’ll diagnose and fix the issue promptly.
benefits: Peace of mind with thorough inspections

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check brake pads, rotors, calipers, fluid, and lines for wear or damage.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We provide a detailed estimate and explain all necessary repairs.

process.title: Service
process.description: Our technicians replace worn parts, bleed the system, and test drive for optimal performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000–70,000 miles depending on driving habits and pad material. We check them during every visit.

faqs.question: What are signs my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squealing or grinding noises, a soft brake pedal, vibration when braking, or a dashboard warning light.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Pinpoint and fix engine issues with advanced diagnostics.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car isn’t running right, our diagnostic experts quickly identify the root cause. From minor sensor replacements to major overhauls, we restore performance and fuel efficiency.

process.title: Scan & Analyze
process.description: We connect advanced diagnostic tools to read error codes and live data.

process.title: Inspect & Test
process.description: We perform visual and mechanical checks to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We complete the repair and test drive to ensure everything is working perfectly.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be a loose gas cap, a faulty oxygen sensor, or a more serious engine issue. We’ll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: How much does an engine diagnostic cost?
faqs.answer: Our diagnostic fee is $89, which is applied toward any repair you choose.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular maintenance.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the best way to protect your engine. We use quality oils and filters, and also check and top off all essential fluids – coolant, transmission, brake, power steering, and windshield washer fluid.

process.title: Drain & Replace Oil
process.description: We drain old oil and replace with the correct grade for your vehicle.

process.title: Replace Filter
process.description: We install a new oil filter to ensure clean oil circulation.

process.title: Fluid Check & Top-Off
process.description: We inspect all fluids and top off as needed, plus check belts and hoses.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need oil every 5,000–7,500 miles. We recommend following your owner’s manual.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic options to match your vehicle’s needs.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Stay comfortable year-round with reliable climate control.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control systems – from refrigerant leaks to blower motor failures. We’ll restore comfort to your cabin quickly.

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor, condenser, and heater core.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: We use UV dye and electronic detectors to find leaks.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We fix the issue and recharge the system to manufacturer specifications.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a clogged condenser. We’ll diagnose and fix it.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend checking the AC system every two years or if you notice reduced cooling.

about.headline: Dallas’s Trusted Auto Repair Since 1995
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair that keeps our community safe and mobile.
story: Buckner Auto Repair was founded in 1995 by master mechanic John Buckner with a simple mission: offer reliable, affordable car care with integrity. What started as a two-bay shop on Buckner Blvd has grown into a full-service facility serving thousands of Dallas drivers. John’s commitment to transparency and craftsmanship built a loyal customer base that spans generations.

Today, our team of ASE-certified technicians carries on that legacy. We invest in the latest diagnostic technology and continuous training to handle everything from routine maintenance to complex repairs. Every job is backed by our satisfaction guarantee because we treat every car as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs and always explain your options clearly.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications for lasting results.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re proud to be a locally owned business that supports our neighbors.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand by our work with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Call (469) 291-5557 or stop by our shop. We’re ready to help.
